plans.title: End-entry plan
plans.designChallenge: A short-side entrance with the accessible WC and service zone arranged at opposite ends of the rear wall.

plans.title: Central shopfront plan
plans.designChallenge: A centred long-side entrance with service to the left and an existing accessible WC at the rear right.

plans.title: Fixed-core plan
plans.designChallenge: A long-side entrance near the right corner with a fixed rear core and structural column that the layout must respect.

agentInstruction: Inspect the selected SVG itself. Treat designChallenge as context, not as a substitute for observed evidence. Report any conflict with /agent/scene-contract.json.
